name: Truora
description: LatAm KYC and background check API for identity verification, AML screening, and WhatsApp-based customer onboarding.

seo.title: Truora — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Truora: LatAm KYC and background check API for identity verification, AML screening, and WhatsApp-based customer onboarding.

when_to_use: LatAm KYC identity verification via WhatsApp onboarding
Background check API for gig economy worker screening
AML sanctions screening for Latin American payment fintechs
Colombian SARLAFT compliance verification for banks
Identity check and fraud scoring for regional credit platforms

pros: Identity plus AML screening in one stack
Strong fit for Mexican, Colombian, Brazilian markets
cons: LatAm focus, limited outside the region
Enterprise sales motion slows pilot kickoff
review.verdict: LatAm-first IDV and background checks with useful WhatsApp flow; a clear pick for regional fintechs.
review.best_for: LatAm fintechs and gig-economy platforms wanting local KYC with WhatsApp-native onboarding
review.not_for: Teams building primarily for US or European users where Truora's LatAm depth is wasted
